issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling for installation or runtime failures.
Skill is limited to Node.js environments and does not support other runtimes.

scenarios.name: Auto-instrument an Express + Postgres API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires NodeSDK with getNodeAutoInstrumentations, OTLPTraceExporter pointed at /v1/traces, ignoreIncomingPaths for /health and /ready, and loads via `node --import ./instrumentation.ts`, while baseline tends to register instrumentation after app import and misses the OTLP endpoint pattern.

scenarios.name: Trace order processing with payment child span
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses tracer.startActiveSpan with nested chargePayment span, setAttribute, recordException, and SpanStatusCode.ERROR on failure, while baseline relies on console logs or a flat span without recordException/status propagation.
